spec_match.rationale: Registers a real Blob-URL SW, mounts a srcdoc iframe whose inline script reads navigator.serviceWorker.controller and posts back. Probe directly tests the v135 spec change.

interactive.rationale: Three-step UI drives real SW plus real srcdoc plus real postMessage round-trip.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises inheritance demo where srcdoc reports a controller — delivered.

edge_cases.rationale: Doesn't cover first-load (no controller yet), nested srcdoc, or fetch interception.

references.rationale: Links to chromestatus 5128675425779712 and Service Worker spec.

design_system.rationale: CSS variables, semantic pills, responsive layout.

openQuestions.title: Cover the no-controller-yet first-load case
openQuestions.detail: Add a skip-claim mode so authors see null controller state.

openQuestions.title: Show actual fetch interception
openQuestions.detail: Spec payoff is interceptable fetches; add a fetch from inside srcdoc and verify SW handler fires.

openQuestions.title: Cleanup previous registrations
openQuestions.detail: Each click creates a new Blob-URL SW. Add unregister or reuse logic.

summary: Cleanest demo of the four — real SW plus srcdoc plus postMessage. Biggest miss is not showing the fetch-interception payoff.
